nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Central Svelte store module for the build state: manages a writable BuildState with localStorage persistence (debounced save), a derived result store that computes damage via calcBuild, and exported mutation functions for enchantments, guild, armor slots, ring/infusion swaps, and build reset

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Writable Svelte store holding the current BuildState, initialized from localStorage with fallback to DEFAULT_BUILD; auto-saves on every change with debounced localStorage writes

nodes.name: effectiveDarknessOverride
nodes.summary: Writable store (boolean|null) that allows UI to override the build's inDarkness flag for the derived damage calculation

nodes.name: result
nodes.summary: Derived Svelte store that combines build and effectiveDarknessOverride to compute full damage output via calcBuild, serving as the primary computed damage output for the entire app

nodes.name: setEnchantment
nodes.summary: Updates a single enchantment value at a given slot and index within the build state, enforcing enchant slot rules via enforceEnchantSlot

nodes.name: swapEnchantments
nodes.summary: Swaps the full enchantment arrays between two armor slots (slotA and slotB) in the build state

nodes.name: clearBuild
nodes.summary: Resets the build store to the DEFAULT_BUILD constant, effectively clearing all user selections

nodes.name: setGuild
nodes.summary: Sets the guild name and rank on the build; when guild is Draconic, forces race to DRAGON BLOODED and initializes draconic color defaults

nodes.name: moveArmorSlot
nodes.summary: Swaps an armor piece and its upgrade level between two armor slot keys (regular or infusion), validating armor compatibility with the target slot type before performing the swap

nodes.name: canArmorMoveToSlot
nodes.summary: Predicate that checks whether a given armor name can be placed in a target armor slot by delegating to armorSupportsSlot with the slot type mapping

nodes.name: swapRingWithInfusion
nodes.summary: Swaps the ring armor piece and infusion ring along with their respective upgrade levels in the build state

nodes.name: loadBuild
nodes.summary: Internal function that reads the build state from localStorage (keyed by STORAGE_KEY_BUILD), parses it as Partial<BuildState>, and merges with DEFAULT_BUILD; returns DEFAULT_BUILD on any error or missing data

nodes.name: ArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Type alias: union of 'helmet' | 'chestplate' | 'leggings' representing the three standard armor slot keys

nodes.name: InfusionArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Type alias: union of 'infusionHelmet' | 'infusionChestplate' | 'infusionLeggings' representing the three infusion armor slot keys

nodes.name: AnyArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Union type of ArmorSlotKey | InfusionArmorSlotKey, representing any of the six armor-related slot keys in the build state

nodes.name: DEFAULT_BUILD
nodes.summary: Internal constant defining the complete default BuildState with all fields initialized: default race from races[0], empty guild/enchantments/infusions, basic weapon parts, upgrade level 5, default constants, and empty cdrToggles

nodes.name: ARMOR_SLOT_TYPE_MAP
nodes.summary: Internal Record mapping each AnyArmorSlotKey to its corresponding armor type string ('Helmet', 'Chestplate', 'Leggings'), used for armor compatibility checks in moveArmorSlot and canArmorMoveToSlot

nodes.name: UPGRADE_KEY_MAP
nodes.summary: Internal Record mapping each AnyArmorSlotKey to its corresponding upgrade level field name in BuildState, used to swap upgrade levels when moving armor between slots
